subtasks.title: Implement CLI flags, parser hardening, and redaction
subtasks.description: Implement CLI flags and wiring: --allow-external, --allow-network-tests, --dry-run, --apply. Map env var GSTACK_AI_ALLOW_EXTERNAL to CLI behavior. Implement typed confirmations for external/apply/network tests. Harden Output Parser with AST-based checks to detect and block network/OS/subprocess usage. Implement redaction/secret detection and include redaction entries in metadata. Add gstack-ai-test show-redactions <generation-id> CLI command. Implement per-generation backups under .gstack_gen/backups/<generation-id>/ for revert.

subtasks.title: CI: LocalMockProvider default & protected opt-in
subtasks.description: Ensure CI jobs use LocalMockProvider by default. Add a protected opt-in CI job that allows external providers behind a secret and job-level flag. Ensure preview diffs and metadata uploaded as artifacts are sanitized (no raw prompt content). Verify artifact retention and access controls for audit artifacts.

subtasks.title: QA: parser fuzzing and security tests
subtasks.description: Implement test matrix covering happy paths, partial parse errors, redaction behavior, and gating. Create fuzz tests that feed malformed model outputs to the parser and ensure resiliency. Add security tests that verify external provider gating, redaction behavior, and network/OS blocking.
